summary: Merged B02 (Commitments) + B05 (Action Items) into unified 'Commitments & Actions' block. New B02 captures both explicit promises with accountability chain AND actionable tasks with decomposition.
design_decisions: Kept B02 block code for continuity (not creating new B## code)
Structure: Commitments table (accountability-focused) + Action Items section (decomposition-focused)
Added 'Commitment' field to action items to link back to explicit promises
Commitments table tracks: Who, To Whom, Why It Matters, Status
Action items preserve B05's rich decomposition: Priority, First Step, Estimated, Domain, Dependencies, Due
Removed Milestones from action items (too verbose; Dependencies covers blockers)
Added explicit language patterns for commitment detection vs action item detection
Preserved B05's 2-minute rule, priority buckets, domain inference

merge_rationale.b02_captured: Accountability chain (who committed to whom), why it matters (stakes/context)
merge_rationale.b05_captured: Task decomposition, priority buckets, first step, time estimation, domain classification
merge_rationale.overlap_resolved: Owner and deliverable were in both; unified into action items section
merge_rationale.new_value_added: Commitment field links actions to promises; explicit commitment vs action distinction

downstream_impacts: B05 references in meeting pipeline need updating (recaps, orchestration scripts)
Block counter needs adjustment (now 1 fewer block code)
Any templates expecting B05 output format need migration
notes_for_orchestrator: B05 references exist elsewhere in the system (likely in orchestration scripts, PLAN references, recap templates). These need to be updated to reference B02 for action items. Recommend a grep search for 'B05' across Prompts/, N5/, and any meeting processing scripts.
